message.content:
@startuml
title CSE & Hosted Resources
participant "Notebook\nAE" as NotebookAE
participant "CSE" as CSE
participant "StreetLight-AE-1\nLight-Container-1" as StreetLightAE1
participant "StreetLight-AE-2\nLight-Container-2" as StreetLightAE2

NotebookAE -> CSE: <s>\nopt
activate CSE
CSE -> StreetLightAE1: RETRIEVE <container>\ncse-in/StreetLight-AE-1/Light-Container-1
activate StreetLightAE1
StreetLightAE1 --> CSE: Response
deactivate StreetLightAE1
CSE -> StreetLightAE2: RETRIEVE <container>\ncse-in/StreetLight-AE-2/Light-Container-2
activate StreetLightAE2
StreetLightAE2 --> CSE: Response
deactivate StreetLightAE2
deactivate CSE
NotebookAE -> NotebookAE: (ed)
@enduml
